description: Extracts line items from noisy OCR invoice text using LLM semantic understanding. The LLM analyzes the OCR text to identify and extract line items despite scanning artifacts, typos, and formatting inconsistencies.
task_description:
Extract line items from this noisy OCR-scanned invoice document.

IMPORTANT: This OCR text contains scanning artifacts, typos, and inconsistent formatting.
You MUST use LLM-based semantic understanding to extract line items accurately.
Regex/pattern matching will NOT work due to OCR noise.

Extract line items as a JSON array. Each line item should have:
- description: Item/service description
- quantity: Number of units (number or null)
- unit_price: Price per unit (number or null)  
- total_price: Line total (number or null)

Return empty array [] if no line items can be confidently extracted.

OCR Text:
LORILLARD YOUTH SMOKING PREVENTION PROGRAM
ACTIVITY REPORT
Account: 08846
Invoice #: 212994
Teen Program
Scholarships
Total Staff Time:
Total Out-of-Pocket:
TOTAL INVOICE:
$42.00
$42.00
$14,750.30
$14,792.30
Coordinated distribution of scholarships to winners
5
-

JSON:

**IMPORTANT: The task provides these input variables:**
- `prompt` (string) - **THE RAW INPUT DATA** that varies per instance. Your activity MUST parse and process this!

**CRITICAL:** Your workflow MUST use `prompt` as the input variable. The prompt contains the raw data to process.
Available variables: prompt

**OUTPUT FORMAT (STRUCTURE DESCRIPTION - NO HARDCODED VALUES!):**
Your activity must return data matching this structure:
```json
json
```

**CRITICAL RULES:**
- The format above describes FIELD NAMES and TYPES only
- Extract ACTUAL values from the `prompt` variable at runtime
- Do NOT hardcode any values from examples
- Do NOT add extra fields
- Match field names EXACTLY as specified

inputs.name: ocr_text
inputs.description: The raw OCR text from a scanned invoice document that may contain scanning artifacts, typos, and inconsistent formatting

output.description: Returns a JSON array of line item objects extracted from the invoice. Each line item has: description (string - item/service description), quantity (number or null - number of units), unit_price (number or null - price per unit), total_price (number or null - line total). Returns empty array [] if no line items can be confidently extracted. Example structure: [{"description": "string", "quantity": number|null, "unit_price": number|null, "total_price": number|null}]

workflow_spec.name: OCR Invoice Line Item Extraction
workflow_spec.description: Extracts line items from noisy OCR-scanned invoice documents using LLM-based semantic understanding. Handles scanning artifacts, typos, and inconsistent formatting to produce structured JSON array of line items.
